name: Team Bullock
subject: critically important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

Greg Gianforte has spent a record-breaking $1.2 million on TV advertising already. Now he's up with another two new commercials airing across the state.

**[Support Steve and pitch in $15 today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5M%2FYV%2FUu0lzbGFC2LmOZqJv6nxvB1Dl%2B)**

At this rate, Mr. Gianforte will spend several million dollars broadcasting his ads into Montanans' living rooms from now until the November election. Steve has a strong record to run on and we don't need to match his opponent dollar for dollar. **But it is critically important that we keep our fundraising on track.[Donate $15 now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fdEbtdk7ZxgMF0zUyzsCec7S6evQq5Z%2B)**

Thanks,

Team Bullock
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VDONF5WYmk2xptnnw%2FedhZv6nxvB1Dl%2B)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ur42wB7Mb42PaqXhn94e8pv6nxvB1Dl%2B).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Team Katie
subject: Katie’s words
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
"Everywhere in Pennsylvania,
families have told me that
Washington has not been
working for them.

That's not acceptable.

We need to give
Pennsylvanians a fair shot
at getting ahead and invest
in their bright futures."

-Katie McGinty

It's time to put working families first.

Pennsylvania, it's your turn.

CHIP IN: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160717&refcode2=e20160717&amount=25

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/7213224117082783744/1976541475718037504.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Michael Tyler, RussFeingold.com
subject: FWD: 98-1.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
They're attacking Russ on his vote against the Patriot Act. | Friend -- Just hours after the horrific attack in France, Senator Ron Johnson's campaign rolled out a new ad attacking Russ for his vote against the Patriot Act. Let me be blunt: This ad is politicizing terrorism -- and it won't work. **[It's critical that we reach our July 20 FEC goal: Each individual contribution helps us fight back against attack ads like this one, and sends a message that we won't stand for this. We can't afford to fall short. Contribute $5 today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a8/965399089/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a9/965399089/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a6/965399089/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a7/965399089/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
This isn't the first time they've attacked Russ for his vote against the Patriot Act -- and you can bet it won't be the last. That's why I'm forwarding Russ's email from April: Russ stands by his vote against the Patriot Act, and we won't back down.
Now, more than ever, our nation needs to pull together to defeat terrorism. But Senator Johnson continues to mislead, divide, and scare.
**[Read Russ's email about his vote against the Patriot Act below, then contribute $5 today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema")**
Just my two cents,
Michael Tyler
Communications Director
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Russ Feingold
Date: Thu, April 14, 2016
Subject: 98-1
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema")
Friend,
People still ask me why I was the only U.S. senator to vote against the Patriot Act -- and Republicans are still attacking me for it. Just this week, a right-wing super PAC supporting Senator Johnson called Let America Work started running ads attacking me for this vote.
**The reason why I was the only senator to vote against the Patriot Act has always been the same: I read the bill.**
When I cast that vote, only six weeks had passed since the horrendous attacks on 9/11.
I initially wanted to vote for the bill. I agreed that, in order to protect our country, we needed to update our laws to account for new technologies, and I worked with the Republican attorney general, John Ashcroft, to try to find a way to do so while still protecting our civil liberties and constitutional rights. I was prepared to support an early version of the bill, which I felt met that test.
But then something awful happened: The Bush administration held secret meetings, took shortcuts in the committee process in the Senate, and presented a new version of the Patriot Act that couldn't be changed. It was outrageous, undemocratic, and, frankly, embarrassing.
This version of the bill was nothing more than an old wish list of the FBI that gave the federal government way too much power to spy on people without adequate oversight. There were provisions that I feared the government would exploit terribly -- and we've since learned that's exactly what happened.
This attack ad came from a super PAC whose sole mission is helping Ron Johnson. It is even being run by his former chief strategist. While Senator Johnson's Washington consultants and super PACs may have a low opinion of Wisconsinites, I don't. Trying to turn important issues of security and civil liberties into simplistic attack ads on my Patriot Act vote will not work.
Politics was the last thing on my mind when I voted "no." Both Republicans and Democrats in Washington, D.C. were furious with me for my vote.
Here in Wisconsin, we know that national security and civil liberties are not mutually exclusive, and both should be beyond partisan politics. Yet Senator Johnson and his allies think the only way to win is by using fear and backing that up with super PAC attack ads. This is what we face over the next seven months of this campaign.
**But if Senator Johnson and his super PACs were listening to the people of Wisconsin, they would know one thing: It won't work.**
We're not going to back down. We're going to fight for what's right.
Thanks for standing with me.
Russ
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4ab/965399089/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-17_jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-pat-act-nd&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a4/965399089/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a5/965399089/VEsHBg/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a2/965399089/VEsHAQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43b8/1c469400/67212c5/356e4a3/965399089/VEsHAA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

But then something awful happened: The Bush administration held secret meetings, took shortcuts in the committee process in the Senate, and presented a new version of the Patriot Act that couldn't be changed. But if Senator Johnson and his super PACs were listening to the people of Wisconsin, they would know one thing: It won't work. We're not going to back down. We're going to fight for what's right. Thanks for standing with me. Russ ""

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: End Fracking on Public Lands
body:
| | | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129601MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17)
---|---|---
| Dear Activist, [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129602MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17)Imagine starting out on a hike or driving through your favorite national forest, and this is your view: **swaths of trees that have been clearcut, hordes of trucks flying along back roads and fracking rigs scattered across the landscape**.

Because our public lands are currently open to fracking, this dirty and dangerous image could become more common for visitors to our national forests and wilderness areas. [**Sign the petition if you think our national forests and other public lands should be protected from fracking**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129603MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17).

As a Colorado native, I am lucky to have the awe-inspiring Rocky Mountains and many areas of public land right in my backyard. Just the other weekend, I went hiking in Arapahoe National Forest. I cannot imagine going out and seeing a clearing with a huge fracking well pad, instead of these beautiful trees. [**Our national forests and public lands are too precious to frack**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129604MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17).

**But fracking is already happening in national forests and public lands across the country** — from Pennsylvania's Allegheny National Forest to the border of Glacier National Park; from illegal fracking in the Florida Everglades to George Washington National Forest in Virginia (which was recently approved for fracking).

**Thanks to the incredible opposition to fracking that has grown across the country** , U.S. Representative Mark Pocan (WI-2) and co-sponsor Jan Schakowsky (IL-9) introduced a bill to ban fracking on all public lands. [**This bill is the strongest piece of federal legislation against fracking to be introduced to date**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129605MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17).

While Food & Water Watch members have already made it clear that fracking should be banned on our public lands (along with allies, we submitted more than 650,000 comments from people like you against the Obama administration's proposed rules for fracking on public lands), **the oil and gas industry is pushing back**. They will do everything they can to kill this bill so they can keep fracking our public lands.

**That's why we need to make sure that this bill has an impressive list of co-sponsors and supporters in Congress.[Ask your representative to co-sponsor this bill to protect our public lands from fracking](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129606MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17)**.

I want to be able to enjoy our parks and forests for years to come, and I want to make sure there will be protected wilderness for future generations to experience. [**Join me in standing up to protect our public lands from fracking today**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00129607MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-07-17).

Thanks for taking action,

Caitlin Seeley George

Caitlin Seeley George
Online Organizer
Food & Water Watch
act(at)fwwatch(dot)org
---
Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L42) if you do not want future newsletters from Food & Water Watch.
If you do not want to receive messages from any of our partners, [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L1) to permanently unsubscribe from all Democrats.com lists.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Be the first to know Hillary’s VP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
You'll know first. | Friend --

Donald Trump promised his supporters that they’d be the first to know who his VP pick was. That... didn't happen.

In fact, between the media leaks, the last-minute hissy fits, the clash between his family and his advisors, and Trump tweeting Mike Pence’s name without warning on Friday, his core supporters were some of the last folks to find out.

That won't happen when Hillary announces her running mate. This campaign, from top to bottom, is committed to sharing that news first with those who’ve been by Hillary’s side the longest. **[Sign up for text message updates from the campaign and you’ll be the first to know her VP’s name.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**This is a promise we intend to keep. If you sign up for text messages, you WILL be the first to know when Hillary announces her running mate. No accidental tweets or leaks to the press:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Text you soon! Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.5 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

***Message & data rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel.** | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYwMDEyNzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDcxNjgwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: You'll know first. | Friend -- Donald Trump promised his supporters that they’d be the first to know who his VP pick was. That... didn't happen. In fact, between the media leaks, the last-minute hissy fits, the clash between his family and his advisors, and Trump tweeting Mike Pence’s name without warning on Friday, his core supporters were some of the last folks to find out. That won't happen when Hillary announces her running mate. This campaign, from top to bottom, is committed to sharing that news first with those who’ve been by Hillary’s side the longest. This is a promise we intend to keep. If you sign up for text messages, you WILL be the first to know when Hillary announces her running mate. No accidental tweets or leaks to the press: Text you soon! Thanks, Jess Jessica Morales Rocketto Digital Organizing Director Hillary for America | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.5 million grassroots donors standing with her: | *Message & data rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Josh Wolf
subject: McConnell could beat us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cd6/738133e4/37f2f3ae/7f82a4ca/3895527358/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160717/?subsource=ngpattre160717a")
---
| Friends,

The speaking schedule for the Republican National Convention (RNC) reads like a who's-who of the most right-wing politicians in the country.

**And Tuesday night, Senator Mitch McConnell takes his turn.**

Mitch McConnell is the one who refuses to hold hearings or a vote on President Obama's Supreme Court nominee. He convinced Marco Rubio to run for reelection. **If Mitch McConnell has his way, Marco Rubio will beat us and McConnell will keep his tight grip on Senate control.**

**Before McConnell stands on that stage, we need to show we 're standing strong against him AND Trump. [_Help us get to 10,000 signatures >>_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cd6/738133e4/37f2f3ae/7f82a4cb/3895527358/VEsE/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e160717a")**

Thanks,

Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Murphy for Florida |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cd6/738133e4/37f2f3ae/7f82a4c4/3895527358/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2cd6/738133e4/37f2f3ae/7f82a4c5/3895527358/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
